summary: Iteration 39: Polish Phase Testing - All 4 features verified working. (1) Field Pulse - FieldGlobeSection has ringsData prop with animation in System tab. SendToGlobeButton dispatches 'globe-field-pulse' event. (2) Impact message persists 8s (line 74 in DailyOrientationQuestion.js confirms setTimeout 8000). (3) RTL polish - philos-section has text-align:right, direction:rtl. (4) Share card animations - share-modal-enter/exit and share-card-enter/exit classes working, Loader2 spinner shows during download. All 5 tabs load correctly. Backend APIs unchanged and working.
critical_code_review_comments: FieldGlobeSection is in System tab (not Home tab) - uses ringsData prop for field pulse ripple animation
SendToGlobeButton correctly dispatches 'globe-field-pulse' CustomEvent with lat/lng/color after successful POST
DailyOrientationQuestion line 74: setTimeout 8000ms confirmed for impact message duration
SendToGlobeButton line 49: setTimeout 6000ms for confirmation message display
RTL CSS in index.css: .philos-section has text-align:right; [dir='rtl'] selectors for button/flex alignment
Share card animations: backdropFadeIn/Out + cardSlideIn/Out keyframes at lines 97-112 in index.css
Minor: Console error during share card download about CSS rules access - known browser security limitation with html-to-image and cross-origin fonts, not a blocker
context_for_next_testing_agent: Polish phase complete. Key testids: field-globe-section (System tab), globe-canvas, globe-live-header, globe-mission-glow, globe-refresh-btn, globe-legend-{direction}, send-to-globe-button, send-to-globe-confirmed, daily-orientation-question, impact-message, share-card-modal, share-card-download, share-card-share, share-card-close. API endpoints: POST /api/orientation/globe-point, GET /api/orientation/globe-activity, GET /api/orientation/globe-region/{cc}. FieldGlobeSection uses react-globe.gl ringsData for field pulse ripple. Share card uses share-modal-enter/exit and share-card-enter/exit CSS animation classes.
